perf_hint: every pixel measures its distance to `points` beam segments, so frame time scales with `points` — on software rendering keep it at 48 or below and preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: complexity
params.description: The figure's order: x runs at this frequency and y one higher, the classic closed knot.

params.name: points
params.description: How many segments trace the beam; more is smoother and costs linearly.

params.name: thickness
params.description: How wide the beam's hot core is, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: glow
params.description: How far the phosphor halo reaches around the beam.

params.name: spin
params.description: How fast the knot tumbles, in turns per second; negative tumbles the other way.

params.name: wobble
params.description: How much fine harmonic ripple the highs run along the beam.

params.name: flash
params.description: How much a hit brightens the beam.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the beam.
